RULING:
ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT RAYMOND LI, ANGELA MOK AND, EVANCE MOK'S Motion For Consolidation Of Actions (CONSOLIDATE ACTION 453058 WITH 457912) IS GRANTED. THE CASES ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR TRIAL PURPOSES. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600. (302/PJM)
